nodes.name: Webhook: Receive Demo Transcript
nodes.notes: Trigger Pipeline A. POST with { transcript_text, filename }

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ role: 'user', content: 'Extract structured account memo JSON from this transcript. Return ONLY valid JSON with fields: account_id, company_name, business_hours, office_address, services_supported, emergency_definition, emergency_routing_rules, non_emergency_routing_rules, call_transfer_rules, integration_constraints, after_hours_flow_summary, office_hours_flow_summary, questions_or_unknowns, notes. Do not invent data. Transcript: ' + $json.transcript }]) }}

nodes.name: Groq: Extract Account Memo
nodes.notes: Calls Groq LLM to extract structured JSON from transcript

nodes.name: Generate Agent Spec
nodes.notes: Generates Retell agent spec from structured memo

nodes.name: Save Outputs to Disk
nodes.notes: Saves memo and agent spec JSON to /data/outputs/

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Logs each processed account to Google Sheets tracker

nodes.name: Webhook: Receive Onboarding Transcript
nodes.notes: Trigger Pipeline B. POST with { transcript_text, account_id }

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ role: 'user', content: 'You are updating an existing account memo with onboarding call info. Return ONLY JSON with two keys: updated_memo (full merged memo) and changelog (array of {field, old_value, new_value, reason}). Existing memo: ' + JSON.stringify($json.existing_memo) + ' Onboarding transcript: ' + $json.transcript }]) }}

meta.description: Clara AI Pipeline - Demo Call to Retell Agent v1, Onboarding to v2 with changelog
